,"serial_count":"749","tags":"都市日常,都市,重生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/67ef69e960b35aba82d94d04a31147f6~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1779311241\u0026x-signature=cjo0DFmRVfPDvTzwNZ4HBGDceVc%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3049376735","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"94"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"202603220507213E08988DAC1180E1D4EA\"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":24,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":7077,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":211271},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7465001256185873176","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这一年看了番茄无数本小说，特别是这种题材的，要说好的也有，但是这本是目前为止我觉得最好的一本，人物形象刻画立体，有幻想有夸张但是也很接地气。此文没有一般重生文神豪文那样一翻身就变泰迪，从始至终都保持本心，女主刻画也很形象，不娇柔造作，不病娇。没有太夸张的丑化女配，反派，龙套。没有恶俗的装逼打脸。值得一看。提醒含糖量较高，当心糖尿病。[笑][笑]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1738226579,"group_id":"7354955950169541656","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3d57Cy0KIZUtKsJMRTfZ8LjyoHLYTj3P/U3Pjt+GDFr","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/3b6c4249c4554648bf2afaa491c7176c~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776706352\u0026x-signature=1JLEPAsZc0Fe%2BsyA9UuaJb8IVDs%3D","user_id":"1814648020534285","user_name":"反正不叫系统名字"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1814648020534285","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_titl
